headline: Citi says defense selloff creates Boeing stock opportunity
summary: Investors have had plenty of reasons to question Boeing over the past few years, but Wall Street is starting to separate the company’s defense story from its better-known commercial aviation challenges. Citi is turning more constructive on parts of the aerospace and defense sector after a sharp ...
